XTP.author: TOM
XTP.head: XTP
XTP.comment: XTP协议中用到的各种包和域

package.name: SendQryOne
package.comment: 查询唯一索引记录请求

package.name: RecvQryOne
package.comment: 查询唯一索引记录应答

Column.name: ShowVolumeTick
Column.label: 前端行情显示最小变动量(服务端不用)

Column.name: MarkedPriceTimes
Column.label: 标记价格计算次数(0:最新价;1-n:次数;空:不生成标记价)

Column.name: FeeDeduceDisCount
Column.label: 作为手续费的抵扣优惠比例

Column.name: FeeDeduceCurrency
Column.label: 作为手续费的抵扣比例

Column.name: LongMaintMarginRatio
Column.label: 多头起始维持保证金率

Column.name: LongMaintMarginStep
Column.label: 多头维持保证金率步长

Column.name: ShortMaintMarginRatio
Column.label: 空头起始维持保证金率

Column.name: ShortMaintMarginStep
Column.label: 空头维持保证金率步长

Column.name: PositionFee
Column.label: 持仓费用或者股票分红等

Column.name: CloseOrderID
Column.label: 平仓指定开仓的订单号

Column.name: OpenPrice
Column.label: 平仓成交时的开仓均价

Column.name: SLTriggerPrice
Column.label: 开仓报单成交之后的止损触发价

Column.name: TPTriggerPrice
Column.label: 开仓报单成交之后的止盈触发价

Column.name: CloseOrderID
Column.label: 平仓指定开仓的订单号

Column.name: CloseOrderID
Column.label: 平仓指定开仓的订单号

Column.name: OpenPrice
Column.label: 平仓成交时的开仓均价

Column.name: SLTriggerPrice
Column.label: 开仓报单成交之后的止损触发价

Column.name: TPTriggerPrice
Column.label: 开仓报单成交之后的止盈触发价

Column.name: VolumeOnClose
Column.label: 正在平仓未成交的数量

Column.name: CloseOrderID
Column.label: 平仓指定开仓的订单号

Column.name: OpenPrice
Column.label: 平仓成交时的开仓均价

Column.name: SLTriggerPrice
Column.label: 开仓报单成交之后的止损触发价

Column.name: TPTriggerPrice
Column.label: 开仓报单成交之后的止盈触发价

Column.name: UseMargin
Column.label: 占用或者减少的保证金

Column.name: PositionFee
Column.label: 持仓费用或者股票分红等

Column.name: CloseOrderID
Column.label: 平仓指定开仓的订单号
